basis: The R013 chart centerline is nearly parallel to the text-derived CJU R013 course.
The same chart centerline is laterally offset from the D30 and IPDAS projected radial/DME/fix positions by more than exact-route tolerance.
The selected source chart linework does not contain a validated turn/intercept shape from YDM R067/D6.5 to CJU R013.

d6_5_cutpoint_reconciliation.label: YDM R067 D6.5
d6_5_cutpoint_reconciliation.reason: The text-derived YDM R067/D6.5 projection lands inside the shared R067 segment neighborhood but remains laterally offset from the selected chart centerline. It cannot be used as an exact chart split point yet.

turn_shape_reconciliation.reason: The training D15 intercept path is constructed from radial math. The selected source chart linework still lacks a validated curved turn/intercept centerline, so it cannot approve exact automation.

exact_runtime_route_decision.reason: Frame-tick georeference shows the selected chart linework is parallel to the intended R013 course but laterally offset from the derived radial/DME/fix positions. Treat it as schematic/offset until source linework can be reconciled by another authority.

remaining_work: Find a source that confirms whether the chart-drawn SID route line is schematic or intended as exact geodetic geometry.
If exact linework is available elsewhere, digitize the D6.5 cutpoint and curved turn/intercept shape from that authority.
Keep exact_runtime_route_allowed=false until D6.5, D30.0, IPDAS, and the turn shape reconcile within exact-route tolerance.
